cfg_statements.code: if n == 1: print(1) else: lib = Factorization() factors = dict() for i in range(2, n + 1): for k, v in lib.get_factors(i).items(): factors.setdefault(k, 0) factors[k] += v ans = 1 for v in factors.values(): ans = ans * (v + 1) % (10 ** 9 + 7) print(ans)
for i in range(2, n + 1): for k, v in lib.get_factors(i).items(): factors.setdefault(k, 0) factors[k] += v
for k, v in lib.get_factors(i).items(): factors.setdefault(k, 0) factors[k] += v
for v in factors.values(): ans = ans * (v + 1) % (10 ** 9 + 7)
if n < 2: # 2より小さい数の場合、素因数分解できない return { n:1 } else: self.__factorization() return self.__factors
if n < 2: return 1 else: self.__factorization() count = 1 for v in self.__factors.values(): count *= v + 1 return count
for v in self.__factors.values(): count *= v + 1

while self.__n > 1: for p in primes: if p + i <= sqrt_: self.__divide_with(p + i) else: # 試し割りする数が平方根を超えたら、ループを抜ける is_break = True # 1が素因数に追加されることを防止 if self.__n > 1: self.__factors.setdefault(self.__n, 1) if is_break: break else: i += 30
for p in primes: if p + i <= sqrt_: self.__divide_with(p + i) else: # 試し割りする数が平方根を超えたら、ループを抜ける is_break = True # 1が素因数に追加されることを防止 if self.__n > 1: self.__factors.setdefault(self.__n, 1)

while self.__n % d == 0: self.__n //= d count += 1
